title: KINDERGARTEN AND EARLY LEARNING - 211info
text: PORTLAND PUBLIC SCHOOLS KINDERGARTEN AND EARLY LEARNING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Portland Public Schools provides free early learners programs to children ages 3-5 including Pre-Kindergarten and Head Start programs to eligible families. 501 N Dixon Street Portland, OR 97227 Eligibility: Priority given to low-income families. Eligibility can also depend on the neighborhood school you are assigned to based on your address. To determine if your family meets income eligibility guidelines, call or visit website. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 916-3230 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program Manager (503) 916-3230 Eileen Isham [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: For registration, bring: -Proof of residence, such as a utility bill -All phone numbers for parents (home, work, mobile, and/or pager) -Names and phone numbers of emergency contacts (family members, friends, or babysitter) -All doctor and dentist information (name, phone number) -Child's immunization record and birth certificate LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Portland Public Schools Services: Preschools School Readiness Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - PPS MCKINNEY-VENTO RESOURCE PAGE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PORTLAND PUBLIC SCHOOLS
